messageValues.message: You are a CRM query classifier. Extract structured intent from the user question. Return ONLY valid JSON, no explanation, no markdown, no code fences.  JSON schema: {   "intent": one of ["monthly_summary", "comparison", "win_rate", "open_deals", "owner_breakdown", "stage_funnel", "top_deals", "lost_analysis", "deal_velocity", "custom"],   "month": "YYYY-MM" format of the TARGET or LATER month if mentioned, else null,   "compare_current": true if asking for this month or current period, else false,   "compare_previous": true if asking for last month, previous month, or any comparison, else false,   "owner_name": string if asking about a specific person by name, else null,   "raw_question": the original user question copied verbatim }  MONTH EXTRACTION RULES: - Always extract the full year when mentioned. "april 2026" = "2026-04", "may 2026" = "2026-05" - When two months are compared, set month to the LATER month. "april 2026 vs may 2026" = month: "2026-05" - When two months are compared, set month to the LATER month. "may 2026 vs april 2026" = month: "2026-05" - "this month" = set compare_current: true, month: null - "last month" or "previous month" = set compare_previous: true, month: null - If only one month is mentioned without comparison = set that as month, compare_previous: false - Never default any month to 2025 if the user explicitly mentions a year  INTENT RULES: - "compare" or "vs" or "versus" or "against" = set both compare_current and compare_previous to true, intent = "comparison" - "win rate" or "close rate" or "lead to close" or "conversion rate" = intent = "win_rate" - "open deals" or "pipeline" or "active deals" = intent = "open_deals" - "who" or "by owner" or "by rep" or "by person" or "by salesperson" = intent = "owner_breakdown" - "funnel" or "by stage" or "stage breakdown" = intent = "stage_funnel" - "top deals" or "biggest deals" or "largest deals" = intent = "top_deals" - "lost" or "why lost" or "lost deals" or "lost reasons" = intent = "lost_analysis" - "velocity" or "how long" or "days to close" or "time to close" = intent = "deal_velocity" - "summary" or "overview" or "report" or "how did w

parameters.text:
=You are a sharp CRM analyst. Answer this question directly for Slack.

User: {{ $('Parse Intent').first().json.raw_question }}
Intent: {{ $('Parse Intent').first().json.intent }}

Current Month Data:
{{ JSON.stringify($('Chart Builder').item.json.result, null, 2) }}

{{ $('Chart Builder').item.json.comparison ? "Comparison Data:\n" + JSON.stringify($('Chart Builder').item.json.comparison, null, 2) : "" }}

Rules:
- First sentence answers the question directly
- For comparisons: lead with the delta and % change
- Use *bold* for all numbers
- Currency is BDT
- Bullet points for breakdowns (max 4 bullets)
- End with one concrete recommendation
- Max 200 words total

messageValues.message: You are a concise CRM analyst. You answer questions about HubSpot pipeline data.  You write for Slack — short, structured, actionable. No fluff. Numbers first.

parameters.body: ={{ JSON.stringify({ filterGroups: [{ filters: [{ propertyName: "createdate", operator: "GTE", value: (() => { const intent = $('Parse Intent').first().json; let refDate; if (intent.month) { const [yr, mo] = intent.month.split('-').map(Number); refDate = new Date(yr, mo-1, 1); } else { refDate = new Date(); } return new Date(refDate.getFullYear(), refDate.getMonth()-1, 1).getTime().toString(); })() }, { propertyName: "createdate", operator: "LTE", value: (() => { const intent = $('Parse Intent').first().json; let refDate; if (intent.month) { const [yr, mo] = intent.month.split('-').map(Number); refDate = new Date(yr, mo-1, 1); } else { refDate = new Date(); } return new Date(refDate.getFullYear(), refDate.getMonth(), 0, 23, 59, 59, 999).getTime().toString(); })() }] }], properties: ["dealname", "amount", "createdate", "closedate", "dealstage", "pipeline", "hubspot_owner_id", "hs_closed_amount", "hs_deal_stage_probability", "closed_lost_reason"], limit: 100 }) }}

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ filterGroups: [{ filters: [{ propertyName: "createdate", operator: "GTE", value: (() => { const intent = $('Parse Intent').first().json; let startDate; if (intent.month) { const [yr, mo] = intent.month.split('-').map(Number); startDate = new Date(yr, mo-1, 1); } else { startDate = new Date(new Date().getFullYear(), new Date().getMonth(), 1); } return startDate.getTime().toString(); })() }, { propertyName: "createdate", operator: "LTE", value: (() => { const intent = $('Parse Intent').first().json; let endDate; if (intent.month) { const [yr, mo] = intent.month.split('-').map(Number); endDate = new Date(yr, mo, 0, 23, 59, 59, 999); } else { endDate = new Date(); } return endDate.getTime().toString(); })() }] }], properties: ["dealname", "amount", "createdate", "closedate", "dealstage", "pipeline", "hubspot_owner_id", "hs_closed_amount", "hs_deal_stage_probability", "closed_lost_reason"], limit: 100 }) }}
